first_run.rationale: The score remains unchanged, and the core reasoning in both evaluations is identical: the candidate has strong senior software engineering experience but lacks the specific, long-term, production-grade AI experience required by the job description. Minor differences in wording and the specific secondary concerns raised (e.g., a confusing start date vs. lack of AI observability experience) fall within the range of normal run-to-run variation and are not plausibly linked to the change in job locations from Western cities to Kenya.
